free_text: Investigation of the mechanism of fast neutron
scattering by even isotopes of molybdenum
Neutron beam was monitored by long counter,
TOF detector, placed at 30 deg relative to initial
Elastic: normalization to neutron flux at 0deg angle.
Inelastic: normalization to scattering cross section
of neutrons by hydrogen in polyethylene sample (1.3 g)
High resolution spectrometer, flight base 3 m
.For neutron flux attenuation, for neutron source
anisotropy, for multiple scattering in samples
